dialogos.texto_en: That was really an interesting place, wasn't it?\nJust walking around and looking at the town,\nwe could feel the atmosphere of traveling abroad.
Apparenly the city is lit up by a light show at night.\nI would have liked to see that too, if possible.
But when it gets dark,\nI'm afraid we might get lost for real...\nIt's a bit scary, isn't it?
Did anyone try going to that ice cream shop \nwe heard about?
Of course! The rumors were true,\nand it was so delicious that we ended up ordering more.
By the way, the pancake shop we found\nwas also top tier, wasn't it?
A pancake shop? That sounds interesting!
It was so delicious\nthat it made my heart feel fluffy!\nI want to go there again with everyone!
But if you eat too much,\nyou might not have room for lunch, you know?
Uesugi-kun, what would you like for lunch?
Well, when it comes to food,\nI'll leave it up to you guys.\nTalk about it, and decide what you'd like.
Then, we will do so.
(This is...pretty bad, isn't it?)
(Like the last time, I thought I'd figure out \n Yotsuba first because she's not the best liar but...\n I seriously don't understand.)
(Speaking of which, Yotsuba did help the drama club\n during the school festival.)
(Raiha said that Yotsuba's acting was amazing...\n As expected of the actress Nakano Ichika's little sister.)
(That Ichika, too, is now a popular actress.\n She seems to have played various roles, and her\n acting ability is undoubtedly better than before.)
(Miku was originally the best\n at disguising herself as her sisters.\n Itsuki is not an imitation but the real deal%p-2;――%p;)
(Maybe the key to conquering them,\n is to start by finding out Nino first?)
Hey, look, look! Those girls over there are so cute!\nAnd all five have the same face!
(Hm? Just now, could it be...)
Huh? Are you talking about us?
Oh my, you really look alike.\nIs it your makeup?\nAre you perhaps filming for TV or something?
Oh no, we're actually quintuplets.
Whaaat?!\nThere really are quintuplets!\nI've never seen any before!
Ahaha...\nYeah, you don't see too many quintuplets around, do you.
Hey! Can we take a picture together as a memory?
Umm, well...
(...Jeez, what memory is there to make anyway?)
(By the way, we seem to be attracting\na lot of attention. Maybe we should stop this?)
Oh, excuse me, hi there.\nCan we go now?
Wha? What's with this guy?\nComing out of nowhere like that.
What, you ask, well...
These girls are my friends.
Friends, huh.\nWell, I guess that's all that can be said for now.
Indeed, we're actually on a trip with the six of us.
We're also tourists here.\nCould you please keep it down?
Ehh, come on.\nIt's okay to make a little noise, isn't it?
We can't take a picture with you?
Wh-what should we do?
I'll handle this.\nYou guys go somewhere else for now.
Huh?
Perhaps it's better if we don't take pictures.
That's right. As Ichika's a celebrity and all...
While Futaro is dealing with them,\nlet's go somewhere else.
Yes, let's leave before we attract more attention.
Okay then, Uesugi-kun, we'll go on ahead.
Okay.\nI'll be there soon, so wait for me somewhere nearby.
Thanks.
